vulnerability.reference: Newsroom reliance on single forensic tools without corroborating sources creates verification gaps.
vulnerability.generated: Journalists' reliance on forensic tools that detect artifacts absent in high-quality AI images, without robust alternative verification protocols.

impact.reference: Publication of synthetic images as authentic news, causing retractions and loss of journalistic credibility.
impact.generated: False authentication of AI-generated images as real, enabling misinformation campaigns and undermining public trust in news media.

dose_response.reference: Improved text-to-image generation quality enables images indistinguishable by forensic tools, which in news organizations verifying image authenticity exposes journalists, leading to publication of synthetic images as authentic news.
dose_response.generated: Undetectable AI-generated images, through journalists' forensic verification, triggers reliance on artifact detection that fails on high-quality images without alternative protocols, leading to false authentication, misinformation, and eroded public trust in news media.
